description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines, featuring a mix of dark and light exterior wall finishes. The front facade includes large windows and a wooden deck, partially shaded by a mature tree, creating a welcoming entrance. The side view reveals an extended wooden patio area and a well-maintained lawn, with additional greenery and shrubs enhancing the landscape. The rear of the bungalow showcases more expansive windows and a secondary entrance, with a driveway leading to a garage. The structure appears to be single-story, with a combination of concrete, glass, and wood materials visible throughout. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a wooden deck surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, wooden deck, and a prominent tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended wooden patio, lawn, and the length of the building.
description_view_2: Rear view with expansive windows, a secondary entrance, and visible driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional greenery, and the overall depth of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
